Grand University Summit 2025

This evaluation report serves as a guide for the institution to acknowledge the impact of the said event on the welfare and enjoyment of the students at La Verdad Christian College вҖ“ Apalit, Pampanga.

Report Summary

of the responses resulted to positive citing speaker and engaging experience such as the venue, speakers, and overall event experience.

of the responses resulted into neutral, providing balanced feedback without strong positive or negative sentiments.

of the responses resulted into negative particularly regarding boring and bad, suggesting areas that need improvement.

Note: Breakdown of qualitative comments will be on the next page

Event Insights and Recommendations

вҳ… Needs Significant Improvement: With only 0% positive feedback from 2000 responses, substantial changes are needed for future events.

вҖў Strengths to Maintain: Participants particularly appreciated speaker, engaging, excellent. These elements received 765 positive mentions and should be prioritized in future planning.

вҖў Areas Requiring Attention: 622 responses highlighted concerns about boring, bad. These areas should be prioritized for improvement.

вҖў Recommendation - Engagement: Consider reducing session duration, incorporating interactive activities, and adding breaks to maintain participant attention and energy levels.

Disclaimer: This is a system-generated recommendation, decision is still up to the management for implementation

Thanks be to God!
